summary: Completed comprehensive testing of School Management System MVP. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate), but frontend has several critical UI bugs that need fixing.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem component has empty value prop causing runtime error
ui_bugs.details: Error: A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string. This breaks the course creation dialog.
Charts showing width(-1) and height(-1) errors, affecting dashboard visualization

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation links for Attendance, Assignments, Progress, Announcements not clickable
ui_bugs.details: Navigation items exist in sidebar but are not responding to clicks

ui_bugs.issue: Logout functionality not accessible via standard selectors
ui_bugs.details: Logout is in dropdown menu but not easily accessible for testing

ui_bugs.issue: Registration link not found on login page
ui_bugs.details: No clear path from login to registration page

integration_issues.issue: Course creation dialog fails to open due to SelectItem error

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical SelectItem empty value error in CourseManagement.js (line 251), fix navigation menu click handlers for Attendance/Assignments/Progress/Announcements, improve chart rendering in dashboard, and ensure logout functionality is accessible. Also add registration link to login page.
